name: GT-state-bounded
source: HOS, refs/hos/joa-m.md:378 (1.2.2 Lemma) + proof, VERBATIM: "Lemma. Let A be an order unit space with order unit e. If $\rho \in A^*$ then $\rho \in S(A)$ if and only if $\|\rho\| = \rho(e) = 1$." Proof: "If $\rho \in S(A)$ and $||a|| \le 1$ then $e \pm a \ge 0$, hence $0 \le \rho(e \pm a) = 1 \pm \rho(a)$, so that $|\rho(a)| \le 1$". Hence for a state rho and self-adjoint a, |rho(a)|<=||a||.
